page_summary: A page containing four paragraphs of text written in an encoded rune-like script, followed by four circular cosmological/mythological illustrations arranged in a 2x2 grid.
text_blocks: ◊⧖⧖ɫ ⧖⧖ ɹ⧖ʁ ᚨᛶᛒ ᛗᚾᚢᛚᛟ • ⧖ᛗᚨᛚᛶᛋ ᛋ ıᛖ ıɱ ᛋᛒ ᛁ ᛍᛒ ɫᛒ ᛖᛗ ıɱ ᛖᛒ ıᛇᛒ⟩ • ᛋᛒᛇᛗ ᛋ ᛒ ɫᛒ • JΞXJY◊◊ᛇᛇ ɹᛇᛇᛟᛇᛇMᛟᚨᚱᛇᛚᛟ • ɫ ɫ ıɱᚾᛒᛒ ɹ ɹ ᛟ ᛇ ᛇ ıɱ ɫ ɟ ᛇ ᛗ ıᛏ ᛍ ɟᛇᛇᛚᛟᛗᛒ • ɹᛇ • JΞXJY◊◊ᛇᛇ ᛖᛖ ᛟᛇᛟᛇᛇM
ıᛖ ıɱᛖᛋ ɹᛒ ᛒ ɹ ıɱ ɫ ɹᛇᛇM ɹ ɹ ᛋ ɹ ıᛖᛒ ıᛏ ıᛇᛇ ᛒ ɹ ı ɟᛇᛇ ɹᛗ ɹᛒ ɹᛇᛇᛍ ᛒᛇᛇᛗ ɹᛟ ɹ ᛇ ᛍ ıᛒ • JΞXJY◊◊ᛇᛇ ɹ ᛍ ɹ ɹ • ɫᛇ ɹ ɹ ıᛖ ɹᛇᛇ ᛍ ᛟᛒ ᛒ ɹᛒ
ıᛒ ɹᛒᛇᛇᛍ • ⧖⧖ ɹ ᛒ ɹᛇᛇ ɟ ɟ ı ᛍ ɹᛇᛇᛇᛒ • JΞXJY◊◊ᛇᛇ ɹᛇᛇᛇM ɹᛇᛇᛇ ɹᛇᛇᛇ ɹᛇᛇᛇ ᛒ ɹ ᛒ ɹᛇᛇᛇ • ⧖⧖ ᛋ ᛒ ɹ ᛇ ᛇ ɹ ᛇ ɹᛇ ᛖ

JΞXJY◊◊ᛇᛇ ɹᛇᛇᛇM ɹᛇᛇᛇᛒ ɹᛇᛇ ı ᛍ ɹ ᛒ ᛟ ɹᛇᛇᛇM ɹᛇᛇᛇM ɹᛇᛇᛇM ɹᛇᛇᛇM ıɱ ᛍ ıᛇ ɹ ᛍ ɹ ɹ ᛇ ɹᛇᛇᛇ ɹᛇᛇᛇ ɟ ɟ • ɫᛇ ɹ ɹ ıᛖ ɹᛇᛇ ᛍ ɟ ɹᛇᛇᛇ ɹᛇᛇᛇ ɟ ɟ • ɹ ᛇ ɹ ɹ ıᛏ ᛒ ɹᛇᛇᛇ ɹᛇᛇ ɹ ɹ ɟ ɹᛇᛇᛇ ᛟ ı ɹ ɟᛇᛇ ᛍ ᛒ ᛇᛇ ᛟᛇ ɹ ıᛖ ɹᛇᛇᛇ ɹᛇᛇ ᛍ ᛒ ɹᛇᛇ ɟ ɟ • ɹ ᛒ ɹ ᛒ ᛟ ᛒ ıᛖᛒ ᛇ ɹ ᛇ ɟ ɟ • JΞXJY◊◊ᛇᛇ ᛒ ɹᛇᛇᛇM ɹᛇᛇᛇ ᛒ ᛇᛇ

symbols.description: Various runic and unusual glyphs scattered throughout the text, resembling Younger Futhark runes mixed with Armenian-style letters and special characters like ◊ (lozenge), ɫ (l with bar), ʁ (Latin small letter inverted glottal stop), ı (dotless i)

decorations.description: Top-left circle: A cosmological diagram with a central vertical axis/divider, an arched shape (possibly cave or underworld) at top, small circles (planets/stars), and several human figures and an animal figure at the bottom
decorations.position: upper left of the 2x2 grid at bottom of page

decorations.description: Top-right circle: A cosmological diagram with a central axis, celestial bodies (sun and moon) at top, dots representing stars, and a creature/figure in the lower portion
decorations.position: upper right of the 2x2 grid at bottom of page

decorations.description: Bottom-left circle: A cosmological diagram with a central vertical axis, figures appearing to climb or descend, with circles (possibly representing eggs or planets) at the bottom and a small opening/portal
decorations.position: lower left of the 2x2 grid at bottom of page

decorations.description: Bottom-right circle: A tree of life-like diagram with a central tree having branches and roots, human figures on either side, and two swastika-like or solar symbols at the bottom
decorations.position: lower right of the 2x2 grid at bottom of page
components: central tree with branches and roots
human stick figures on left and right

uncertain_or_unreadable: The script is not a standard alphabet; it appears to be a constructed or encoded writing system mixing runic forms, Armenian letters, and invented characters. Transcription is approximate and many characters cannot be confidently mapped to known alphabets.
The exact meaning of the four circular diagrams is unclear; they appear to depict mythological or cosmological narratives (possibly related to creation myths given the tree, axes, and figures).
Some characters that look like ◊ (lozenge/diamond) and special letters (ɫ, ʁ, ı) are used repeatedly as if they were letters of the script.
